greeting: Hi, I'm a newly recruited soldier. I always dreamed of becoming a Royal Knight. I hope you surpass me and reach your destination.
blunder: Wait... you saw that piece was defended and still played that move? That's not confidence. That's assisted suicide.
My village cow once charged a tree because it thought it was another cow. That was a more calculated decision.
If mistakes were military achievements, you'd already outrank the Monarch.
check: Check. Even a recruit can see that your king is in danger.
capture: Thank you. I wasn't sure how I'd get that piece, but you solved the problem for me.
promotion: A new queen already? At this rate I'll become a Royal Knight before you leave the training grounds.
default: The soldiers back home always told me to keep practicing.
Maybe one day we'll both reach our dreams.
I still have a long way to go.
victory: The road ahead is filled with stronger warriors. If you can't beat a recruit, perhaps your journey ends here.
A chicken stole my lunch last week and somehow showed better tactical awareness than you.
defeat: Well fought. Perhaps you'll reach the heights I never could.
